title: leptasea austromontana
intro: Leptasea austromontana is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the Austro-Montana Lovage. It is native to Australia and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots and leaves, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. Leptasea austromontana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its herbal preparations are also used in aromatherapy and topical applications for skin and wound care.
